entity_structure.description: Taco Bell Franchisor LLC is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Taco Bell Franchisor Holdings LLC, which is owned by Taco Bell Funding LLC (the Issuer), which is owned by TBC. The Company, Franchise Holder 1, Franchisor Holdings, IP Holder, and the Issuer are all single-member special purpose Delaware LLCs formed for the securitization.
entity_structure.key_fact: Company has NO employees. All officers are TBC employees. No management expenses allocated to Company.

unit_counts.note: These counts include ALL Taco Bell units (Traditional + Express), not just Express. Growth driven by new restaurants and transfers from Franchise Holder to Company.

revenue_recognition.continuing_fees: Sales-based royalty exception under Topic 606 — recognized as restaurant sales occur
revenue_recognition.continuing_fee_rates: Typically 5.5% for traditional franchise agreements; 10% for non-traditional units
revenue_recognition.upfront_fees: Initial, successor, and transfer fees recognized over term of franchise agreement on straight-line basis
revenue_recognition.franchise_incentives: Cash/equipment incentives capitalized and amortized as reduction in Franchise and license fees over expected cash flow period

franchise_incentives_detail.purpose: Drive new unit development or same-store sales growth to generate higher future revenues
franchise_incentives_detail.types: Cash payments to incent new unit openings, free or subsidized restaurant equipment
franchise_incentives_detail.accounting: Capitalized as Franchise incentives on balance sheet, amortized as reduction in revenue

deferred_franchise_fees.deposits_2024: $14.0M (upfront fee deposits for stores not yet opened and future successors)

securitization_notes.security: Substantially all assets of Securitization Entities including all existing and future US Taco Bell franchise/license agreements and royalties, US Taco Bell IP, certain trust accounts, equity interests
securitization_notes.not_guaranteed_by: YUM or any other non-securitization subsidiary of YUM
securitization_notes.leverage_ratio_trigger: 5.0:1 triggers 1%/year amortization — not triggered as of Dec 31, 2024
securitization_notes.debt_service_coverage_requirement: 1.75:1 for cash reserve; 1.1:1 for rapid amortization
securitization_notes.status_2024: In compliance with all covenants, no rapid amortization events

restricted_cash.purpose: Senior notes interest reserve account required by indenture
restricted_cash.location: One financial institution, exceeds FDIC insured amounts

fiscal_year_note.53rd_week_2024: Added $12.8M to total revenues and net income

key_findings.income_taxes: Company is disregarded entity for tax purposes — no income taxes at entity level. Income taxed at TBC/YUM level.

related_party.master_franchise_agreements: 25-year agreements with TBC and TBA for company-operated restaurants. Royalty rates consistent with third-party franchisees.
related_party.due_to_affiliates: $0.6M (2024) — reimbursement of cash refunds and incentive payments made by Manager on behalf of Company

key_findings.subsequent_events: Evaluated through March 26, 2025 (issuance date). No items requiring disclosure.
